title: ProjectSkyhigh
body:
# Project SkyHigh

Project Skyhigh is a Vanilla+ modpack designed to be played with friends, where you and your friends build complex towns and factories using Create. Write and experience complex stories with your friends.

# Features
- ⚙️ **Create** Build complex steampunk-style factories using Create and its addons.
- 🚊 **Transport** Get to different places by using trains, planes, or cars.
- 🧮 **Skills** Fight to earn skill XP and unlock powerful abilities.
- 🪙 **Economy** Get rich by selling to other players or spend all your money at someone else's shop.

# Credits

- [simply swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
- [simply skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-skills)
- And more

</details>
